— 歡迎 Bienvenidos Welcome —

A neighborhood
school where three languages
grow together.

In the Excelsior, on a quiet block of Madrid Street, kids from sixty-some families spend their days reading, building, and arguing about books — in English, Spanish, and Cantonese. K through 5. Public. Yours.

About Monroe

A multilingual school in the Excelsior
Our School

A San Francisco Public School

Monroe is a happy, multilingual, and multicultural K–5 school offering three academically aligned language programs — flourishing with talented teachers, energized parent groups, special grants, and school beautification projects.

Come see it for yourself!

Monroe families make this school extraordinary. Join the PTA, sign up for ParentSquare, or lend a hand at one of our events. Every bit of help goes straight to our kids.
